products.soaManager: Platinum, founded in 1994, is an Australia-based investment manager that focuses on one asset class, international shares, they provide portfolios of listed companies from around the world.
products.soaStrategy: The Fund will ideally consist of 50 to 100 listed Asian companies that Platinum believes to be undervalued. Platinum may short sell securities that it considers overvalued. The Portfolio will typically have at least 50% net equity exposure.
products.soaRationale: The departure of several key investment staff (many with long tenures and central roles in the investment process) raises concerns around the stability and depth of the team. These changes come at a time when the firm has struggled with sustained underperformance across multiple strategies, failing to keep pace with both global and regional benchmarks. Compounding these issues are recent media reports suggesting the firm is actively exploring a sale or strategic buyer, adding further uncertainty around future direction and continuity. Given the combination of team disruption, weak relative returns, and corporate instability, we believe is prudent to place all Platinum funds on Sell.

products.soaManager: Wellington Management, as the Fund’s investment manager, was appointed with a mandate to construct and manage a diversified portfolio of hedge Funds. Wellington is one of the oldest global provider of alternative investment management.
products.soaStrategy: The fund is a bespoke investment strategy that targets the greater of a net return of 4% p.a. or Cash, with a volatility lower than 6% p.a. We view MFG as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Other Financials sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.

products.soaRationale: We view NHF as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Insurance sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.
products.soaCombined: NIB Holdings Ltd. engages in the provision of health and medical insurance. It operates through the following segments: Australian Residents Health Insurance, New Zealand Residents Health Insurance, International (Inbound) Health Insurance, and Travel. The Australian Residents Health Insurance segment offers product within the Australian private health insurance industry. The New Zealand Residents Health Insurance segment comprises product for the New Zealand private health insurance industry. The International (Inbound) Health Insurance segment includes health insurance products for international students and workers. The Travel segment refers to distribution of travel insurance products. The company was founded in 1952 and is headquartered in Newcastle, Australia. We view NHF as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Insurance sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.

products.soaRationale: We view ALX as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Defensive sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.
products.soaCombined: Atlas Arteria Ltd. owns, operates and develops toll roads . It operates through the following segments: APRR, ADELAC, Dulles Greenway, and Warnow Tunnel. Its projects include toll roads, bridges, tunnels, and investment in entities in the same industry sector. The company was founded on December 16, 2009 and is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia. We view ALX as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Defensive sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.

products.soaRationale: We view ORA as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Cyclical sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.
products.soaCombined: Orora Ltd. engages in the manufacturing and distribution of fiber, glass and aluminum beverage cans. It operates through the following segments: Orora Australasia and Orora North America. The Orora Australasia segment focuses on the manufacture of fiber and beverage packaging products within Australia and New Zealand. Its products include glass bottles, beverage cans, wines closures, corrugated boxes, cartons and sacks, and the manufacture of recycled paper. The Orora North America segment activities include purchasing, warehousing, selling and delivering a range of packaging and other related materials. Its activities also include integrated corrugated sheet and box manufacturing and equipment sales capabilities and the point of purchase retail display solutions, and other visual communication services. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Hawthorn, Australia. We view ORA as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Cyclical sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.

products.soaRationale: We view NEC as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Cyclical sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.
products.soaCombined: Nine Entertainment Co. Holdings Ltd. is an Australian media and entertainment company. The firm's specialization include television, live events, and online media industries. It operates through four segments: Broadcasting, Digital and Publishing, Domain Group, and Stan. The Broadcasting segment includes free to air television activities and metropolitan radio networks in Australia. The Digital and Publishing segment includes other and metropolitan media. The Domain Group segment includes real estate media and service businesses. The Stan segment includes subscription video on demand service. The company was founded on October 16, 2006 and is headquartered in North Sydney, Australia. We view NEC as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Cyclical sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.

products.soaCombined: IDP Education Ltd. engages in the education business, which provides placement of international students into education institutions in Australia, the United Kingdom, the United States, Canada, and New Zealand. It offers services such as counseling, application processing, and pre-departure guidance. The company was founded in 1969 and is headquartered in Melbourne, Australia. We view IEL as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Consumer Services sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.

products.soaRationale: We view RWC as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Cyclical sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.
products.soaCombined: Reliance Worldwide Corp. Ltd. engages in water technology business. The firm's activities include the design, manufacture, and distribution of branded water flow and control products and solutions for the plumbing industry. Its products include fittings and pipes, control valves, thermostatic products, water meters, underfloor and radiant heating control components, plastic extrusion products, and fire protection system products. The company was founded in 1949 and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA. We view RWC as a quality addition to your domestic equity portfolio, providing exposure to the Cyclical sector of the Australian market with the opportunity for capital and income returns.

products.soaRationale: ASIC has finalised its approval for CBOE to enter the Australian Listings market. This marks the end of the ASX's Listings monopoly. The loss of license is likely a response to the multiple years of operational issues and the lack of innovation. The loss of the Listing monopoly adds to the negative storm of issues the ASX has to face.
products.soaCombined: ASX Ltd. engages in operating a securities exchange. Its products and services include listing and issuer services; trading venue; clearing and settlement activities; exchange-traded and over-the-counter products; and information and technical services. The company was founded in April 1987 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. ASIC has finalised its approval for CBOE to enter the Australian Listings market. This marks the end of the ASX's Listings monopoly. The loss of license is likely a response to the multiple years of operational issues and the lack of innovation. The loss of the Listing monopoly adds to the negative storm of issues the ASX has to face.

products.soaRationale: Downside earnings risk and margin pressure remain ahead. Without a clear path to increase returns and grow tangible book value per share, BOQ’s fundamental lack of scale is likely to present a headwind to returns.
products.soaCombined: Bank of Queensland Ltd. engages in the provision of financial services to the community. It operates through the following segments: Retail Banking, BOQ Business, and Other. The Retail Banking segment offers retail banking solutions to customers managed through its owner managed and corporate branch network, direct channels, third party intermediaries, virgin money distribution channels, and ME Bank. The BOQ Business segment includes the BOQ branded commercial lending activity, BOQ Finance, and BOQ Specialist businesses. It also provides tailored business banking solutions including commercial lending, equipment finance and leasing, cash flow finance, foreign exchange, interest rate hedging, transaction banking, and deposit solutions for commercial customers. The Other segment refers to the treasury, insurance, and group head office. The company was founded in 1874 and is headquartered in Newstead, Australia. Downside earnings risk and margin pressure remain ahead. Without a clear path to increase returns and grow tangible book value per share, BOQ’s fundamental lack of scale is likely to present a headwind to returns.

products.soaRationale: We expect MPL will deliver a solid FY25 given the benign claims environment has continued and markets performance has been strong. Despite this, the outlook for FY26/27 is now much more at risk, especially if it shows ‘over earning’. Trading on ~22x FY26 EPS, it is above its historical range and above other insurance peers. We therefore see the downside risks outweighing any potential short-term earnings bump when it reports in August. We downgrade our rating to Sell.
products.soaCombined: Medibank Private Ltd. engages in the underwriting and distribution of private health insurance policies through Medibank and ahm brands. It operates through Health Insurance, and Medibank Health segments. The Health Insurance segment offers private health insurance products including hospital cover and ancillary cover, as stand-alone products and packaged products. The Medibank Health segment offers a range of activities including contracting with government and corporate customers to provide health management services, as well as providing a range of telehealth services in Australia. The company was founded in 1976 and is headquartered in Docklands, Australia. We expect MPL will deliver a solid FY25 given the benign claims environment has continued and markets performance has been strong. Despite this, the outlook for FY26/27 is now much more at risk, especially if it shows ‘over earning’. Trading on ~22x FY26 EPS, it is above its historical range and above other insurance peers. We therefore see the downside risks outweighing any potential short-term earnings bump when it reports in August. We downgrade our rating to Sell.

products.soaRationale: While COVID 19 has impacted short term traffic performance, the Group is the dominant owner of toll roads within Australia. Structured toll increases and ongoing development opportunities are part of the portfolio, which should see earnings rebound as traffic flows recover post COVID.
products.soaCombined: Transurban Group Ltd. engages in the development, operation and maintenance of toll roads. It operates through the following geographical segments: Melbourne, Sydney and Brisbane in Australia and North America. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Docklands, Australia. While COVID 19 has impacted short term traffic performance, the Group is the dominant owner of toll roads within Australia. Structured toll increases and ongoing development opportunities are part of the portfolio, which should see earnings rebound as traffic flows recover post COVID.

products.soaRationale: The stock has come under pressure given its high exposure to office assets and the increasing uncertainty as to the long term work place habits of corporates. The company has continued to grow its funds management capabilities to diversify its income streams and trades at a significant discount to its stated NTA.
products.soaCombined: Dexus engages in real estate investments, leasing and tenant services. It operates through the following segments: Office, Industrial, Property Management, Funds Management, Development & Trading, and Others. The Office segment offers domestic office space with any associated retail space, car parks and office developments. The Industrial segment comprises of domestic industrial properties, industrial estates and industrial developments. The Property Management segment provides property management services for third part clients and owned assets. The Funds Management segment offers funds management of third party client assets. The Development & Trading segment provides revenue earned and costs incurred by the group on developments and inventory. The others segment comprises of corporate expenses associated with maintaining and also include the treasury function managed through a centralized treasury department. Dexus was founded in 2004 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. The stock has come under pressure given its high exposure to office assets and the increasing uncertainty as to the long term work place habits of corporates. The company has continued to grow its funds management capabilities to diversify its income streams and trades at a significant discount to its stated NTA.

products.soaRationale: Owner of a high quality diversified portfolio however leasing risks in the office and retail portfolios and increasing debt headwinds are weighing on the stock.
products.soaCombined: GPT Group operates as a real estate investment property trust. It invests in retail, commercial, hotel, industrial, and office park properties. It operates through the following segments: Retail, Office, Logistics, Funds Management and Corporate. The Retail segment includes regional and sub-regional shopping centers as well as equity investment in GPT Wholesale Shopping Centre Fund. The Office segment comprises of prime central business district office properties including some associated retail space as well as GPT's equity investment in GPT Wholesale Office Fund. The Logistics segment manages logistics and business park assets and on it equity investment in GPT Metro Office Fund. The Funds Management segment engages in the management of two Australian wholesale property funds in the retail and office sectors and management of one Australian listed property fund in the metropolitan office and business park sector. The Corporate segment involves in cash and other assets and borrowings and associated hedges plus resulting net finance costs, management operating costs and income tax expense. The company was founded by Dick Dusseldorp in 1971 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. Owner of a high quality diversified portfolio however leasing risks in the office and retail portfolios and increasing debt headwinds are weighing on the stock.

products.soaRationale: Mirvac’s passive and high quality office portfolio continues to outperform other office portfolios, given its relatively low capex and efficient building footprint. The residential portfolio continues to perform well relatively although the increasing residential headwinds have impacted return expectations. While they are not immune, their dominant apartment exposure and strong repeat buying network should insulate them to some degree versus other residential developers.
products.soaCombined: Mirvac Group engages in real estate investment, development, third party capital management and property asset management. It operates through the following segments: Office and Industrial, Retail, Residential, and Corporate. The Office and Industrial segment manages the office and industrial property portfolio to produce rental income along with developing office and industrial projects. The Retail segment involves the management of the retail property portfolio, including shopping centers to produce rental income. The Residential segment designs, develops, markets, and sells residential properties to external customers. The Corporate segment covers group-level functions including governance, finance, legal, risk management, and corporate secretarial; and holds an investment in the Tucker Box Hotel Group. The company was founded by Henry Pollack and Robert Hamilton in 1972 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. Mirvac’s passive and high quality office portfolio continues to outperform other office portfolios, given its relatively low capex and efficient building footprint. The residential portfolio continues to perform well relatively although the increasing residential headwinds have impacted return expectations. While they are not immune, their dominant apartment exposure and strong repeat buying network should insulate them to some degree versus other residential developers.

products.soaRationale: A new management team is in place, and while they have some initial wins, the significant residential headwinds are hard to overlook, given the rising interest rate environment.
products.soaCombined: Stockland engages in the business of real estate. It operates through the following segments: Commercial Property, Residential, Land Lease Communities, Retirement Living, and Other. The Commercial Property segment invests in, develops and manages retail town centres, workplace and logistics properties. The Residential segment delivers a range of masterplanned and mixed use residential communities in growth areas, and townhomes and apartments in general metropolitan areas. The Land lease Communities segment invests in, designs, develops and manages communities for over 50s. The Retirement Living segment invests in, designs, develops, manages and sells communities for over 55s and retirees. The Other segment includes strategic investments and other items which are not able to be classified within any of the other defined segments. The company was founded by Ervin Graf in 1952 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. A new management team is in place, and while they have some initial wins, the significant residential headwinds are hard to overlook, given the rising interest rate environment.

products.soaRationale: A global leader with a highly regarded management team in the logistics space and operates an investment/development/management integrated business model. Continues to be a main beneficiary of the strong e-commerce thematic, which has seen the Group upgrade their earnings.
products.soaCombined: Goodman Group engages in the development, owning, and management of industrial property and business space. It involves in the investment in directly and indirectly held industrial property, investment management, property services, and property development. The company was founded by Gregory Leith Goodman in 1989 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. A global leader with a highly regarded management team in the logistics space and operates an investment/development/management integrated business model. Continues to be a main beneficiary of the strong e-commerce thematic, which has seen the Group upgrade their earnings.

products.soaRationale: Australia's largest owner of gas transmission and distribution pipelines in Australia with long term contracts in place to transport gas through their network. The investment portfolio generates enviable free cash flow, which is retained to operate a "growth strategy".
products.soaCombined: APA Group engages in the ownership and operation of energy infrastructure assets and business. It operates through the following business segments: Energy Infrastructure, Asset Management, and Energy Investments. The Energy Infrastructure segment includes all wholly and majority owned pipelines, gas storage and processing assets, and power generation assets. The Asset Management segment provides commercial services, operating services and asset maintenance service to the energy investments of the company and Australian Gas Networks Limited. The Energy Investments segment is comprised of the strategic stakes in a number of investment entities that house energy infrastructure assets of the company. The company was founded in June, 2000 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. Australia's largest owner of gas transmission and distribution pipelines in Australia with long term contracts in place to transport gas through their network. The investment portfolio generates enviable free cash flow, which is retained to operate a "growth strategy".

products.soaRationale: Own's arguably the highest and most productive shopping centre portfolios in Australia with high barriers to entry. Has been one of the main beneficiaries of the reopening trade and the portfolio continues to deliver improving metrics.
products.soaCombined: Scentre Group engages in the ownership and operation of pre-eminent shopping center in Australia and New Zealand. It operates through the Property Investments, and Property Management and Construction segments. The Property Investment segment includes net property income from shopping centers. The Property Management and Construction segment refers to the external fee income from third parties, primarily property management and development fees, and associated business expenses. The company was founded in July 1959 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. Own's arguably the highest and most productive shopping centre portfolios in Australia with high barriers to entry. Has been one of the main beneficiaries of the reopening trade and the portfolio continues to deliver improving metrics.

products.soaRationale: Vicinity's overall portfolio has benefitted from the reopening trade, but its high exposure to CBDs has been slower to recover. Cash collections remain weaker than peers, given the Group's significant exposure to Melbourne and ongoing challenges exist in remixing the portfolio.
products.soaCombined: Vicinity Centres operates as a real estate investment trust, which engages in the development, operation, and management of shopping centers. It operates through the following business segments: Property Investment and Strategic Partnerships. The Property Investment segment comprises of net property income derived from investment in retail property. The Strategic Partnerships segement offers property management, development, leasing, and management of wholesale property funds. The company was founded on February 18, 1985 and is headquartered in Chadstone, Australia. Vicinity's overall portfolio has benefitted from the reopening trade, but its high exposure to CBDs has been slower to recover. Cash collections remain weaker than peers, given the Group's significant exposure to Melbourne and ongoing challenges exist in remixing the portfolio.

products.soaRationale: After several years of significant outperformance, the potential for asset values to come under pressure as a result of the rising interest rate environment has seen the share price retreat significantly from it's highs.  While the balance sheet remains in good shape, and their earnings seem to be largely unaffected at this stage, the market remains cautious on the medium term outlook for the Group.
products.soaCombined: Charter Hall Group engages in managing and investing in office, retail, and industrial properties. It operates through the following segments: Property Investments, Development investments, and Property Funds Management . The Property Investments segment comprises investment portfolio of property funds. The Development investments segment comprises investments in developments. The Property Funds Management segment offers investment management services and real estate management services. The company was founded by Cedric Fuchs and David John Southon in 1991 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. After several years of significant outperformance, the potential for asset values to come under pressure as a result of the rising interest rate environment has seen the share price retreat significantly from it's highs.  While the balance sheet remains in good shape, and their earnings seem to be largely unaffected at this stage, the market remains cautious on the medium term outlook for the Group.

products.soaRationale: RGN is an owner of neighbourhood and sub-regional shopping centres, focused on convenience retailing across Australia. Convenience retailing has proven to be a resilient asset class due to its exposure to non-discretionary retail tenants. Many of the Group’s convenience-based retail centres have a strong weighting to food sales, due to grocery-based anchors such as supermarkets. RGN’s portfolio benefits from long-term leases to Woolworths Group Limited and Coles Group Limited, which act as an anchor tenant at each property.
products.soaCombined: Region Group engages in the investment and management of shopping centres. Its portfolio includes shopping centres and retail stores. The company was founded on October 3, 2012 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. RGN is an owner of neighbourhood and sub-regional shopping centres, focused on convenience retailing across Australia. Convenience retailing has proven to be a resilient asset class due to its exposure to non-discretionary retail tenants. Many of the Group’s convenience-based retail centres have a strong weighting to food sales, due to grocery-based anchors such as supermarkets. RGN’s portfolio benefits from long-term leases to Woolworths Group Limited and Coles Group Limited, which act as an anchor tenant at each property.

products.soaRationale: CQR owns a portfolio of shopping centres that focus heavily on the non discretionary retail category. Vacancy is low and leases have either fixed or increasingly CPI reviews which should insulate from higher inflation.
products.soaCombined: Charter Hall Retail REIT is a real estate investment trust. It invests in convenience and community based supermarket anchored shopping centers that aim to provide a secure and growing income stream to unit holders. The firm is managed by Charter Hall Group, one of Australia’s property groups, which owns and manages office, retail and industrial properties. The company was founded on July 21, 1995 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia. CQR owns a portfolio of shopping centres that focus heavily on the non discretionary retail category. Vacancy is low and leases have either fixed or increasingly CPI reviews which should insulate from higher inflation.

products.soaRationale: WPR owns a portfolio of service stations with ling term leases and fixed reviews.
products.soaCombined: Waypoint REIT Ltd. is a real investment trust fund that engages in property leasing and investment. It has 425 services stations located through Australian States and Territories. The company is headquartered in Docklands, Australia. WPR owns a portfolio of service stations with ling term leases and fixed reviews.

products.soaManager: Specialised Private Capital Ltd is the investment manager and trades as Centric Capital. Centric Capital is both a platform operator and fund manager established in the early 2000s.
products.soaStrategy: The model aims to provide a return above CPI + 0.50% net of fees over the medium-term investing predominately in income focused assets, combined with some capital growth exposure. The portfolio consists of a diversified blend of income and growth assets where the weighting to growth assets is in the range of 5-40%
products.soaRationale: We view this fund as a quality addition to your portfolio, providing investment grade exposure to diversified securities.
